heading: Repealed. –(11), (13),Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 887, § 4(a)(8)70 Stat. 947
label: 21 to 24 Repealed. –(11), (13),Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 887, § 4(a)(8)70 Stat. 947
notes: Sections 21 to 23 prescribed oath of office for customs officers and assistant appraisers.
Section 24 related to designation of persons to administer oath of office.
Section 22 was based on R.S. § 2614; , title 1, .act July 5, 1932, ch. 43047 Stat. 584
Section 23 was based on R.S. § 2615; , title 1, .July 5, 1932, ch. 43047 Stat. 584
Section 24 was based on R.S. § 2617; , .act Feb. 8, 1875, ch. 36, § 1118 Stat. 309
amendments: Section 22 was based on R.S. § 2614; , title 1, .act July 5, 1932, ch. 43047 Stat. 584
Section 23 was based on R.S. § 2615; , title 1, .July 5, 1932, ch. 43047 Stat. 584
